lines.english: There, the Name of the One Lord is chanted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਲੋਚਦੇ ਸੋ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sur nar mun jan lochade so satigur deea bujhaae jeeo |4|
lines.english: The angelic beings and the silent sages long for Him; the True Guru has given me this understanding. ||4||
How is the Society of the Saints to be known?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬੁਝਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: eko naam hukam hai naanak satigur deea bujhaae jeeo |5|
lines.english: The One Name is the Lord's Command; O Nanak, the True Guru has given me this understanding. ||5||
This world has been deluded by doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ਲਗਾ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਭਾਗ ਜਿਨਾ ਕੇ ਨਾਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: parataap lagaa dohaaganee bhaag jinaa ke naeh jeeo |6|
lines.english: The discarded soul-brides suffer in terrible agony; they have no luck at all. ||6||
You Yourself, Lord, have led it astray.
They miss their Husband Lord, and they wander around in dishonor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੇ ਵੇਸ ਤਿਨਾ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਦੁਖੀ ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: maile ves tinaa kaamanee dukhee rain vihaae jeeo |7|
lines.english: The clothes of those brides are filthy-they pass their life-night in agony. ||7||
What are the signs of the discarded brides?
What actions have the happy soul-brides performed?
They have obtained the fruit of their pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਕੈ ਆਪਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: nadar kare kai aapanee aape le milaae jeeo |8|
lines.english: Casting His Glance of Grace, the Lord unites them with Himself. ||8||
have the Shabad of His Word abiding deep within.
Those, whom God causes to abide by His Will,
Those who take pleasure in God's Will

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੀਆ ਸੇ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਸਹ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: saheea se sohaaganee jin seh naal piaar jeeo |9|
lines.english: They are the true soul-brides, who embrace love for their Husband Lord. ||9||
remove doubt from within.
Meeting with the True Guru, they receive the fruits of their destiny,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਐਸਾ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜੋ ਸਭਸੈ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur aisaa jaaneeai jo sabhasai le milaae jeeo |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, know Him as the True Guru, who unites all with the Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟਿਆ ਭਾਗੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਆਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: duramat kaa dukh kattiaa bhaag baitthaa masatak aae jeeo |11|
lines.english: The pain of evil-mindedness is eliminated; good fortune comes and shines radiantly from their foreheads. ||11||
and egotism is driven out from within.
The Bani of Your Word is Ambrosial Nectar.
It permeates the hearts of Your devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸੇਵਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਰਖਿਐ ਆਪਣੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sukh sevaa andar rakhiai aapanee nadar kareh nisataar jeeo |12|
lines.english: Serving You, peace is obtained; granting Your Mercy, You bestow salvation. ||12||
Meeting with the True Guru, one comes to know;
by this meeting, one comes to chant the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਸਭ ਥਕੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: satigur baajh na paaeo sabh thakee karam kamaae jeeo |13|
lines.english: Without the True Guru, God is not found; all have grown weary of performing religious rituals. ||13||
I am a sacrifice to the True Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਰਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: nadar kare je aapanee aape le ralaae jeeo |14|
lines.english: If the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, He unites us with Himself. ||14||
I was wandering in doubt, and He has set me on the right path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇਆ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਜੋਤਿ ਧਰੀ ਕਰਤਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh paragatt hoeaa jaa kau jot dharee karataar jeeo |15|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Creator is revealed to the Gurmukh, within whom He has infused His Light. ||15||
and yet, the Creator keeps Himself concealed.
You, Lord, are pervading in all,
He creates and bestows body and soul.
The Master Himself bestows honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਰਖੀਆ ਦੁਇ ਕਰ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੬॥
lines.translit: aapane sevak kee paij rakheea due kar masatak dhaar jeeo |16|
lines.english: He Himself preserves the honor of His servants; He places both His Hands upon their foreheads. ||16||
My God knows everything.
All strict rituals are just clever contrivances.
He has not considered my merits and demerits;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪੁ ਵਰਤਾਇਓ ਸਭੁ ਲੋਕੁ ਕਰੈ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੭॥
lines.translit: pragatt prataap varataaeo sabh lok karai jaikaar jeeo |17|
lines.english: He has made His Glory manifest, and all people celebrate Him. ||17||
Within my mind and body, I meditate on God.
this is God's Own Nature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਕੈ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਤਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: kantth laae kai rakhion lagai na tatee vaau jeeo |18|
lines.english: Hugging me close in His Embrace, He protects me, and now, even the hot wind does not touch me. ||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ਸਿਰਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਤੂੰ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: saah paatisaah sir khasam toon jap naanak jeevai naau jeeo |19|
lines.english: You are the Supreme Lord and Master, above the heads of kings. Nanak lives by chanting Your Name. ||19||
I have obtained the fruits of my soul's desire.
